Klasse PluginChangeEvent.PluginInstallEvent

java.lang.Object
org.quurz.plugins.events.PluginChangeEvent
org.quurz.plugins.events.PluginChangeEvent.PluginInstallEvent
Umschließende Klasse:

public static final class PluginChangeEvent.PluginInstallEvent extends PluginChangeEvent

Event indicating that a new plugin has been installed.
